dealershipId.title: Dealership Account Id
dealershipId.description: The Account Id of the dealership to check slots for. Use the dealershipId returned by Find Nearest Dealership.

preferredDate.title: Preferred Date
preferredDate.description: The date to check for available slots. Must be a specific Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Convert natural-language dates like 'this Saturday' before calling.
